subcodes.first_line: ...Verily, ‘Abdu’l‑Baha inhaleth the fragrance of the love of God from every meeting place where the Word of God is uttered
subcodes.first_line_orig: انّ عبدالبهآء یشمّ رائحة محبّة اللّه من کلّ محفل تنطقین فیه بکلمة اللّه و تذکرین الحجج و البراهین
subcodes.subjects: @status of kings; future of monarchy, @methods of teaching the Cause, @non-participation in politics, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual baptism
